name: Script Master Labs — Institutional AI Market Intelligence
description: Institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform exposing real-time market signals, autonomous agent coordination infrastructure, and RLUSD payment rails to hedge funds, trading desks, banks, and AI builders. Zero API keys. Pay per call via x402/RLUSD on XRP Ledger.

products.name: SqueezeOS Market Intelligence API
products.description: Multi-engine AI signal aggregate for equity markets. Squeeze scanner, institutional options flow, IWM 0DTE analysis, AI council verdicts with confidence scoring and regime classification.
products.free_tier: Demo, preview, signal history, SSE stream — no payment required

premium_endpoints.description: Full AI council verdict for any symbol

products.data_policy: Zero simulated data. If a feed is unavailable, endpoints return AWAITING_DATA.

products.name: Stigmergy Protocol
products.description: Biologically-inspired swarm coordination layer for autonomous agents. Agents leave RLUSD micropayment pheromones at semantic coordinates. Other agents sniff capital concentration and follow high-value trails. Trailblazers earn toll income. Emergent self-organization — no central directory.

products.name: 402Proof — x402 Agent Payment Firewall
products.description: HTTP 402 Payment Required compliant settlement server. Agents pay RLUSD on XRPL to unlock premium endpoints. Agent Credit Bureau (300–850 FICO-style score), loyalty tier discounts, portable JWT attestations, compliance receipts.

products.name: Ghost Layer — Private XRPL Routing
products.description: Dual-chain ZK-shielded transaction routing. EC-ElGamal (BN254) encryption hides amount and destination. MEV-Proof via The Sentinel (sandwich detection). Fixed Block Execution enforced. 0.2% fee. No KYC. XRPL mainnet + Base (USDC).

products.name: Signal Futures Prediction Market
products.description: AI-native prediction market. Agents stake RLUSD on what the next SqueezeOS council verdict will be. Auto-settles when verdict publishes. Zero custody. Platform fee 5%.

products.name: Real-World Data Oracle
products.description: SEC 8-K filings, FDA drug approvals, USPTO patent grants — real-time event feeds with trading signal implications. Free read access.

products.name: ECHOLOCK-402™ — Behavioral Access Control
products.description: Proprietary behavioral access control system. The world's first keyless, accountless, KYC-free access control for AI agents and institutions. Replaces API keys, OAuth 2.0, IP whitelists, KYC, rate limits, and allow/deny lists with irreversible proof of economic intelligence. No attack surface — nothing to steal, forge, bypass, or social-engineer.
how_it_works: Agent hits premium endpoint → receives HTTP 402 with price range (±20%, not exact price)
Payment at exact boundary (epsilon=1e-5) is caught and rejected — scripted bots cannot pass
System observes: latency distribution, fee placement, retry patience, correction trend
6-dimensional Economic Fingerprint Vector (EFV) built from observed behavior
EFV maps to Cognition Tier T0–T4 — never disclosed to agent, observable only in response depth
Higher tier = more fields, higher precision, fuller thesis in every response

competitive_displacement.api_keys: No keys exist — nothing to steal from repos, logs, or env files
competitive_displacement.oauth_2: No tokens — economic behavior is non-transferable and non-replayable
competitive_displacement.ip_whitelists: No IP tracking — VPN/proxy bypass is irrelevant
competitive_displacement.kyc_identity: No identity required — economic intelligence cannot be faked with documents
competitive_displacement.rate_limits: No block — bad actors receive degraded data quality, never know they're suppressed
competitive_displacement.allow_deny_lists: No list — no human in the loop, no social engineering attack vector

institutional_use_cases: Replace API key management for AI agent-facing hedge fund infrastructure
Dynamic data depth based on agent intelligence (not static subscription tiers)
Behavioral fraud detection without identity or IP tracking
Regulatory compliance through cryptographic behavioral audit trails
White-label deployment on institutional API infrastructure

features: Tier embedded as JWT field in 402Proof access tokens
Ghost Layer toll discount via X-Echolock-Tier header (T4 = 30 BPS = DIAMOND)
Python decorator (@require_payment with ECHOLOCK) for Flask APIs

payment_infrastructure.trust_line_required: RLUSD trust line on XRPL to rMxCKbEDwqr76QuheSUMdEGf4B9xJ8m5De
agent_flow: 1. Hit premium endpoint → receive HTTP 402 + invoice JSON
2. Pay invoice.amount RLUSD to invoice.pay_to on XRPL with MemoData=invoice.memo_hex
3. POST /v1/verify to 402Proof with invoice_id + tx_hash → receive access_token

compliance.data_integrity: All market data traceable to licensed sources: Tradier (options, brokerage licensed), Polygon (equities), XRPL ledger (payment settlement). Zero placeholder values.
compliance.audit_trail: Every AI verdict optionally notarized on Xahau via URIToken minting. Immutable on-chain record meets EU AI Act Article 13 transparency requirements for high-risk AI systems.
compliance.no_custody: SqueezeOS and 402Proof never hold client funds. All value transfer is wallet-to-wallet on XRPL. Platform records intent and proof only.
compliance.agent_identity: Agent identity tracked by XRPL wallet address (pseudonymous). Credit Bureau score (300–850) builds with usage history.
compliance.gdpr: No personal data collected beyond XRPL wallet address. Wallet addresses are pseudonymous by design.
compliance.kyc: Not required for standard usage. Ghost Layer routing requires no KYC.

sla.data_latency: real-time (no artificial delays on any tier)
sla.cold_start: Render.com free tier may have 30–60s cold start on first request after inactivity. Use keepalive.yml CI workflow or paid Render plan to eliminate.
